inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar hai, bahut tezi se bukhar aaya hai, sir dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Common cause of high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely without other symptoms like retro-orbital pain

inputs.text: Ab toh aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Also causes joint pain, but less likely to cause retro-orbital pain

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely to cause retro-orbital pain and bone pain

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Classic symptoms of Dengue: fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely to cause bleeding gums and rash

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Does not typically cause retro-orbital pain or rash

inputs.text: Ab toh bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar bilkul nahin hai, lekin abhi bhi thakawat hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Recovery phase, but may still show signs of dehydration and weakness

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to presence of characteristic Dengue symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to absence of characteristic symptoms like chills and rigors
